title: Pinterest Week-0 Canary Unlock
summary: Technical health is GREEN. Recovery verdict remains RED solely because trust_score=36 is below the Week-1 ramp threshold of 60. A controlled Week-0 canary path has been installed.
why_red_with_empty_blockers: publish_unlocked is controlled by trust/ramp, not a hard technical blocker.
canonical_path: PCIE2 -> pcie2_publish_queue -> pcie2-publisher (force_live=true) -> POST /v5/pins -> GET /v5/pins/{id} verification

safety.atomic_unlock: Prior values of global_stop/pcie2_publish_enabled captured, flipped, restored in finally{}
safety.post_publish_lock: Both gates always restored to LOCKED after the canary
safety.legacy_blocked: pcie2-legacy-guard.mjs continues to block every legacy publisher path

first_run_attempt.result: 401 unauthorized (agent has no admin JWT - function is admin-gated by design)
first_run_attempt.next_step: Admin clicks 'Run Week-0 Canary' on /admin/pinterest-recovery; dashboard invokes function with admin session

queue_status.note: Canary will return DEFERRED (no_candidate) until pcie2-creative-worker assembles a publish-ready candidate (image_url + board_id required).
